Walgelijk.AssetPackageBuilder 0.10.0+c496a5c827909150db31980b10da13888211fc33
Copyright (C) 2026 Walgelijk.AssetPackageBuilder

  -m, --Mode      (Default: Pack) Program mode (pack or extract).

  -i, --Input     Required. Path to input directory.

  -o, --Output    Path to output archive. Will use input folder name if
                  unspecified.

  -f, --Force     Will overwrite if true.

  -d, --Id        Determines package ID. Falls back to directory name if not
                  provided.

  --help          Display this help screen.

  --version       Display version information.
